summary: Weekly product sync covering API redesign progress, user research findings, and partner integration decisions.

action_items.description: Send updated API documentation to the frontend team by Friday
Share user research summary deck with team by end of day tomorrow
Schedule a meeting to review user research findings
Touch base with design team about onboarding flow
Send the updated API docs to frontend team
Follow up on batch processing insight with architecture team

next_steps: Review user research findings next week
Coordinate with design team on onboarding flow
decisions: Use REST over GraphQL for partner integration
learnings: Enterprise customers strongly prefer batch processing over real-time updates
